title: lithospermum californicum
intro: Lithospermum californicum, also known as California gromwell or California lupine, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its root, which contains a range of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic acids. Lithospermum californicum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The herb can be prepared in various forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including wounds, eczema, and bronchitis.
